name: prompt-harness
description: Capture private agent evidence and run review-gated adaptive badcase regression across models.

interface.shortDescription: Private traces, Test Hub, replay, and adaptive badcases.
interface.longDescription: Prompt Harness captures human prompts and complete Claude Code/Codex traces, turns explicit corrections into human-reviewed badcases, runs Red/Green feature and task workflows in Test Hub, pins safe project snapshots, compares approved model adapters, judges outcomes, and manages minimal compensations through probation and retirement.
capabilities: explicit session-to-project binding and append-only migration
feature-chain and multi-phase task-case Test Hub
approved cross-model replay adapters and outcome judges
bounded execution policies and manual attribution
lightweight project indexes and per-session trajectory views
defaultPrompt: Initialize Prompt Harness for this project and explain what will be stored.
Backfill this project's Claude Code and Codex user prompts, then validate the ledger.
Review this project's pending badcase candidates without changing prompts or tests.
